title: fuirena simplex var. aristulata
intro: Fuirena simplex var. aristulata, also known as slender wood club-rush, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Fuirena simplex var. aristulata include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are commonly used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
